description: You are a Precision Agriculture Technician who has just completed a full day of pesticide applications on corn fields. Document today's spray operations for regulatory compliance and crop protection records in the farmOS Field Kit app by creating five logs. Create an Activity log named 'Pre-spray boom calibration check' at 7:30 AM (mark as Done) with notes: 'Boom pressure 30 PSI, nozzle flow rate 0.3 gpm each, GPS guidance active, mixing equipment calibrated. All systems within spec for application.' Create an Input log named 'Glyphosate application Field 3 North' at 8:00 AM (mark as Done) with notes: 'Glyphosate 32 oz/ac + 2,4-D amine 16 oz/ac in 15 gal/ac water. EPA Reg No 524-475. Corn pre-plant burndown. Wind 5 mph NW, temp 68F.' Create an Input log named 'Azoxystrobin fungicide Field 3 South' at 10:30 AM (mark as Done) with notes: 'Azoxystrobin + propiconazole at 10.8 fl oz/ac. White mold preventive at V6 corn. Boom height 20 inches, canopy penetration verified.' Create an Observation log named 'Post-spray drift assessment' at 12:30 PM (mark as NOT Done) with notes: 'Minor drift observed toward east fence line. 30-ft buffer maintained. Follow-up check of neighboring soybean field required in 24 hours before marking complete.' Create an Activity log named 'Sprayer rinse and storage' at 1:30 PM (mark as Done) with notes: 'Triple-rinse procedure completed. Rinsate applied to treated field. Two worn nozzle tips replaced on boom section 4. Sprayer parked in equipment shed.'
